name: Dishwasher Upper Rack Adjuster Kit
description: This is the upper rack adjuster kit for your dishwasher. The kit includes all parts needed to adjust the height of the upper rack. The upper rack adjuster allows you to move the upper rack to two positions. If the adjuster breaks, the rack may become stuck or fall. This is an OEM part directly sourced from the manufacturer.

name: Dishwasher Door Latch Assembly
description: Door latch assembly for dishwasher. If your dishwasher door does not latch or stay closed during a cycle, the door latch assembly may need to be replaced. The door latch assembly is used to keep the dishwasher door closed during the wash cycle so water does not leak out. OEM part.

name: Dishwasher Lower Dishrack
description: Lower dishrack assembly for dishwasher. This is the bottom rack that holds your dishes, pots, and pans during the wash cycle. If the rack becomes rusted, bent or the tines break, it may need to be replaced. This part is gray in color.

name: Dishwasher Silverware Basket
description: Silverware basket for dishwasher. This silverware basket sits in the lower rack and holds your silverware during the wash cycle. If the basket becomes broken, cracked, or tines become bent, it may need to be replaced. This is the original OEM part.

name: Dishwasher Pump and Motor Assembly
description: Pump and motor assembly for dishwasher. This is the motor that drives the pump to circulate water during the wash and rinse cycles. If your dishwasher is not washing dishes properly or making unusual noise, the pump and motor assembly may need to be replaced.

name: Dishwasher Control Board
description: Electronic control board for dishwasher. The control board manages all functions of the dishwasher including wash cycles, drying, and water temperature. If your dishwasher does not start, stops mid-cycle, or displays error codes, the control board may be faulty.

name: Dishwasher Spray Arm
description: Lower spray arm for dishwasher. The spray arm rotates during the wash cycle and sprays water on the dishes in the lower rack. If the arm becomes clogged with debris or broken, it may need to be replaced. This is an OEM replacement part.

name: Dishwasher Water Inlet Valve
description: Water inlet valve for dishwasher. The water inlet valve opens to allow water to enter the dishwasher tub. If the dishwasher is not filling with water, or is overfilling, the water inlet valve may need to be replaced.

name: Dishwasher Detergent Dispenser
description: Detergent and rinse aid dispenser assembly for dishwasher. This dispenser holds and releases dishwasher detergent and rinse aid at the correct time during the wash cycle. If the dispenser door does not open or detergent is not being released, the dispenser assembly may need to be replaced.

name: Dishwasher Door Gasket
description: Door gasket / door seal for dishwasher. The door gasket creates a watertight seal between the dishwasher tub and door. If the gasket becomes torn or worn out, water may leak from the dishwasher. This part is approximately 73 inches long.

name: Dishwasher Heating Element
description: Heating element for dishwasher. The heating element heats the water in the dishwasher tub during the wash cycle and also dries the dishes at the end of the cycle. If your dishes are not drying properly or water is not heating to the proper temperature, the heating element may need to be replaced.

name: Dishwasher Float Switch
description: Float switch assembly for dishwasher. The float switch monitors the water level inside the dishwasher tub and shuts off water fill when the tub reaches the proper level. If the dishwasher overfills, the float switch may be stuck or broken.

name: Refrigerator Ice Maker Assembly
description: Ice maker assembly for refrigerator. This ice maker assembly replaces several different ice maker part numbers. If your ice maker has stopped making ice, is making too little ice or the ice maker is leaking, this ice maker assembly may need to be replaced. This part includes the ice maker, mounting hardware, and wiring harness.

name: Refrigerator Water Filter
description: Refrigerator water filter. This water filter removes contaminants from your water and ice, providing clean, great-tasting water. Replace every 6 months or 200 gallons. The EveryDrop filter is NSF certified to reduce 28 contaminants including lead, mercury, asbestos, and industrial chemicals.

name: Refrigerator Door Gasket (Fresh Food)
description: Fresh food door gasket for refrigerator. The door gasket creates a seal that prevents warm air from entering the refrigerator. If the gasket is torn, cracked, or no longer seals properly, cold air can escape which causes the refrigerator to work harder to maintain temperature. This gasket is white and measures approximately 55 inches x 26 inches.

name: Refrigerator Water Inlet Valve
description: Water inlet valve for refrigerator. The water inlet valve is an electrically-controlled valve that opens to supply water to the dispenser and ice maker. If the refrigerator is not making ice or the water dispenser is not working, the water inlet valve may be defective.

name: Refrigerator Evaporator Fan Motor
description: Evaporator fan motor for refrigerator. The evaporator fan motor draws air over the evaporator coils and circulates it throughout the refrigerator. If the refrigerator is not cooling properly or the freezer is too warm, the evaporator fan motor may need to be replaced.

name: Refrigerator Defrost Thermostat
description: Defrost thermostat for refrigerator. The defrost thermostat monitors the temperature of the evaporator coils. When the coils drop to a certain temperature during a defrost cycle, the thermostat cuts off power to the defrost heater. If the freezer is frosting over, the defrost thermostat may be defective.

name: Refrigerator Defrost Heater Assembly
description: Defrost heater assembly for refrigerator. The defrost heater melts frost that has accumulated on the evaporator coils. If the freezer is frosting over or the refrigerator is not cooling properly, the defrost heater assembly may need to be replaced.

name: Refrigerator Temperature Control Thermostat
description: Temperature control thermostat for refrigerator. The temperature control thermostat directs voltage to the compressor and fan circuits to maintain the refrigerator temperature set by the user control. If the refrigerator temperature is too warm or too cold, the thermostat may need to be replaced.

name: Refrigerator Compressor Start Relay
description: Compressor start relay for refrigerator. The start relay is a small device mounted to the side of the compressor. It works in conjunction with the start winding to start the compressor. If the refrigerator is not cold enough or the compressor won't run, the start relay may be defective.

name: Refrigerator Ice Maker Water Inlet Valve
description: Ice maker water inlet valve for refrigerator. This dual water inlet valve controls water flow to both the ice maker and water dispenser. If the ice maker is not making ice or the water dispenser is not working, the water inlet valve may need to be replaced.

name: Refrigerator Freezer Door Gasket
description: Freezer door gasket for refrigerator. The door gasket creates an airtight seal to keep cold air in the freezer. If the gasket is torn, stiff, or no longer sealing properly, frost buildup and warm temperatures may result. This gasket is approximately 55 inches x 22 inches.

name: Refrigerator Electronic Control Board
description: Electronic control board for refrigerator. The main control board manages all of the functions of the refrigerator including the compressor, defrost heater, and dispenser. If the refrigerator is not working at all or certain functions are not operating, the control board may be defective.

name: Refrigerator Ice Maker Shut-Off Arm
description: Ice maker shut-off arm for refrigerator. The ice maker shut-off arm (also called the ice level arm) rides on top of the ice in the ice bin. When ice reaches a certain level, the arm rises and shuts off the ice maker. If the arm is broken or missing, the ice maker may overfill or not make ice at all.

name: Refrigerator LED Light Board
description: LED light board for refrigerator. This is the LED light assembly that illuminates the interior of your refrigerator. If your refrigerator light is not working, flickering, or stays on when the door is closed, the LED light board may need to be replaced.

name: Refrigerator Shelf Glass
description: Refrigerator shelf glass. This is the glass shelf for the interior of your refrigerator. If the shelf is cracked or broken it should be replaced. This shelf measures approximately 25 inches x 15 inches and is a clear glass shelf.

name: Refrigerator Ice Dispenser Solenoid
description: Ice dispenser solenoid for refrigerator. The ice dispenser solenoid controls the ice chute door. When you press the ice dispenser, the solenoid opens the chute door and allows ice to fall into the glass. If you can hear the auger motor running but no ice is dispensing, the solenoid may be defective.

name: Dishwasher Control Panel
description: Control panel for dishwasher. The control panel is the face of the dishwasher that has the push buttons and display. If the buttons on the control panel don't work or the display is not functioning, the control panel may need to be replaced.

name: Dishwasher Drain Pump
description: Drain pump for dishwasher. The drain pump removes water from the dishwasher at the end of each cycle. If your dishwasher is not draining or water is standing in the tub after a cycle, the drain pump may need to be replaced.

name: Dishwasher Upper Spray Arm
description: Upper spray arm for dishwasher. The upper spray arm rotates during the wash cycle and sprays water on the dishes in the upper rack. If the arm becomes clogged with debris or broken, the upper rack dishes may not get clean.

name: Refrigerator Water Dispenser Actuator
description: Water dispenser actuator for refrigerator. The actuator is the paddle or button you press to get water from the dispenser. If water is not dispensing or the button is broken, the actuator may need to be replaced.

name: Refrigerator Crisper Drawer
description: Crisper drawer for refrigerator. This is the clear crisper drawer that holds fruits and vegetables. If the drawer becomes cracked or broken, food may fall out or the humidity control may not work properly. Measures approximately 23 inches x 16 inches x 7 inches.

name: Dishwasher Tub Seal
description: Tub seal for dishwasher. The tub seal is located around the pump housing and prevents water from leaking out of the dishwasher tub. If you notice water pooling on the floor under the dishwasher, the tub seal may need to be replaced.
